name: components-improvement
description: Improve already-implemented runtime renderers: capability gaps (select search/multi, table resize/sticky/aggregation, crud polling/collapsible-query, form shell, button icon/loading/tooltip, dialog/drawer size/Esc), naming standardization (shadcn/ui alignment), and contract-drift fixes (input-text minLength/maxLength/pattern, tree cascade, crud selection fields, condition-builder showIf/selectMode). Driven by existing-components-improvement-roadmap.md. amis is reference only, NOT the yardstick; requests sink to data-source; no frontend export; chart stays recharts.
